issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 BENTLEY CONTINENTAL GT. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE VEHICLE WAS PURCHASED UNDER THE ASSUMPTION THAT IT WAS EQUIPPED WITH ALL SEASON TIRES; HOWEVER, THE VEHICLE WAS EQUIPPED WITH SUMMER TIRES. THE CONTACT STATED THAT HE EXPERIENCED DIFFICULTY MANEUVERIN

narrative.headline: What 2015 Bentley Continental Gt owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Vehicle Speed Control (100% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
